# Loss — How the Model Learns {#sec-ch11-loss}

So far we have traced the forward pass from end to end.
But none of that knowledge was conjured from thin air.
The model _learned_ by making predictions, measuring how wrong they were, and nudging every weight in the right direction — billions of times.

This chapter is about that measurement: the *loss function*.

{{< include book/11-loss/sections/idea.qmd >}}

{{< include book/11-loss/sections/crossentropy.qmd >}}

{{< include book/11-loss/sections/matrix.qmd >}}

{{< include book/11-loss/sections/code.qmd >}}

{{< include book/11-loss/sections/takeaways.qmd >}}
